title: hieracium virgicaule var. subtatrae
intro: Hieracium virgicaule var. subtatrae, also known as Hieracium subtatrae or False Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium virgicaule var. subtatrae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, Hieracium virgicaule var. subtatrae has been prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
